mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or forward returns show no statistical significance during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that immediately suppress corporate earnings expectations and drive negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength that sustains corporate revenue growth and produces positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in retail sales and housing starts fail to predict positive 60d returns with a t-statistic above 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle trigger immediate risk-off positioning as investors anticipate supply chain bottlenecks and margin compression.
failure_condition: Industrial production declines during tightening periods do not precede negative 5-day returns with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Core inflation accelerating above 2.5% forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and generates negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns remain positive in > 70% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds the 0.25% monthly threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic capacity and wage growth that supports consumer spending and drives positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Rolling 3-year Rank IC for payroll growth predicting 60-day returns remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising real GDP growth and falling retail sales indicates inventory accumulation and weakening final demand, which triggers negative equity returns as earnings revisions turn downward.
failure_condition: The GDP-retail sales divergence signal fails to predict negative 20d returns with a p-value below 0.10 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production rebounds during a post-shock recovery phase signal rapid capacity utilization that boosts short-term earnings momentum and generates positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Industrial production increases during recovery regimes do not precede positive 5-day returns with a hit rate above 55%.
